project_type: Custom AI operating system (C++17) - hybrid reasoning engine
build_system: Makefile using clang++ with -std=c++17 -O2, links against libcurl and libsqlite3. All .cpp files under MK_OS are compiled except tools/ and main_*.cpp files.
test_framework: No formal test framework - the project uses compile-time validation
verification_instructions: Run 'make all' from MK_OS/ directory and confirm zero compile errors. All .cpp files are header-guarded and included via the find-based compilation in the Makefile.
setup_instructions: clang++ with C++17 support, libcurl, libsqlite3 must be available
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Build tools and standard packages available. Project targets macOS (Darwin) but compiles on Linux too.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT create duplicate directories. New files go into existing directories. Follow the existing code style: header guards (#ifndef/#define/#endif), class-based design with iostream logging, format: source|relation|target|weight for .mk files.
key_patterns: Each .cpp file uses #ifndef header guards and is self-contained. Classes use constructor logging (std::cout << [MODULE]). The MKHTTP class in network/http.cpp provides HTTP GET via libcurl. Knowledge files use pipe-delimited format. The Makefile auto-discovers all .cpp files except tools/ and main_* files.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is root. ai_core/ has reasoning modules. network/ has HTTP and autonomous agent. mk_brain/ has learning, reasoning, vector search. tools/ has standalone utilities. system/ has entry point. ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/ has all .mk knowledge files.
